title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.900 - Sales tax authorized (Blue Springs, Centralia, Excelsior Springs, Fayette, Hannibal, Harrisonville, Joplin, Lebanon, Marshall, Moberly, Nevada, Odessa, Portageville, Riverside, Smithville, Springfield, St. Joseph, Sunrise Beach, and certain other fourth class cities) — proceeds to be used for public safety purposes — ballot language — collection of tax, procedure
